title: Items 'n Stuff (IS)
description: This Mod Adds Over 52 New Items and Blocks to the Game!
body: [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/Items-n-stuff?logo=modrinth&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/items-n-stuff) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/items-n-stuff?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/items-n-stuff) ### **Items 'n Stuff 2.0 Super Soon** # Items 'n Stuff ### Description **Items 'n Stuff** adds a lot of new block and items for roleplay and content creation. Here's what **Items 'n Stuff** currently adds: - **Couches With 10 Colors** - **Shelf** - **Laptop** - **2 Plushies** - **Toilet** - **Pedestal (with working item animations)** - **and MANY MORE ITEMS & BLOCKS!!!!!** ## Now on all the major modloaders! ## License This project is licensed under the [Amethyst License](LICENSE). ### What you **CAN** do: * **Share and copy:** You can share and copy the material in any medium or format, as long as it's not modified. * **Non-commercial use:** You can use the work for non-commercial purposes. ### What you **CANT** do: * **Commercial use:** You cannot use the work for commercial purposes, such as selling it or using it in a way that generates revenue. * **Derivatives or Adaptations:** You cannot modify, transform, or build upon the material, meaning you cannot create derivative works or adaptations, unless specifically permitted by the author. #### The Amethyst License, and variations of it, are based on CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 but will not reflect changes made by, or updates to, the Creative Commons Licenses. The Amethyst License is maintained by Amethyst Group (Amethyst) and is designed for our mods. **Get Items 'n stuff today! and don't forget to join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ePQhfmQjnF)!**
